\"16 personas, 2 bancales con material r: "16 people, 2 beds from recycled materials, a café terrace with no water nearby. With the capillary system: watering every few weeks. The café's second floor is now an intergenerational garden."
\"Bases de datos dispersas unificadas en: "Scattered databases unified into a single platform for quick access during diagnosis. A multipurpose tool adapted exactly to how the team works."
\"Brócoli morado, alcachofas y habas en: "Purple broccoli, artichokes and broad beans in the building's courtyard. Staff took seedlings home. The courtyard lemons began to be shared. A first harvest that opens up conversations."
\"Diagnóstico, vermicompostera, germinad: "Assessment, worm composter, seed germinator, container bed and how to reuse shower water for irrigation. The family now manages its waste and grows its own food in the apartment."
“Me encantaría sembrar y ver crecer mis: “I would love to sow and watch my seeds grow, harvest food and share it”
\"No sólo una asesoría de suelo: visita: "Not just soil advice: a site visit, design, seasonal planting list, educational infographic and constant support. We hope to soon invite him to see our garden." — Primary-level parent
\"Pasto descuidado convertido en huerta: "Neglected lawn turned into a street garden: tomatoes and sunflowers in summer, broad beans and cauliflower in autumn. The dry cleaner's staff have their own green space — and neighbours stop to look."
\"Plan maestro completo: compostera, ban: "A complete master plan: composter, mobile self-watering bed with integrated worms, and solar advice. A bed that doubles as a green wall and moves to follow the sun each season."
\"Plan maestro con bancal autorregante,: "A master plan with a self-watering bed, worm composter and a vine pergola built to give natural shade in summer and cool the house. The vine as a bioclimatic solution."
